explanations:
Woman: Now find the shoe behind the dog.
Boy: Behind the dog? Oh, yes! I can see it.
Woman: Good. Have you got a blue pencil?
Boy: Yes, I have.
Woman: Great! Colour it with that pencil, then.

Woman: Can you see the shoe on the mat?
Boy: Yes! What colour for the shoe on the mat?
Woman: You can choose the colour.
Boy: OK. Brown!
Woman: I like it!

Woman: Now colour the shoe next to the robot.
Boy: The shoe next to the robot… OK!
Woman: Would you like to colour it yellow?
Boy: Yes! It’s my favourite colour.
Woman: Wow, it’s my favourite, too!

Boy: Which shoe can I colour now?
Woman: The one in front of the boy.
Boy: The one in front of the boy … OK. What colour?
Woman: Hmm … make it grey.
Boy: Cool.

Woman: There’s a shoe under the cupboard. Can you see it?
Boy: Yes, I can. Can I make that green, please?
Woman: That’s a nice colour—yes!
Boy: OK.
